content.body:
I’m going to be speaking with Aki at the Web Engines Hackfest on this project tomorrow, with a breakout session the day afterwards. I I invite you to participate — I’m hoping this will be a way to recruit more members to this group and get more feedback on the draft. My part of the talk will be the same thing as I presented in Barcelona in the March CRA Unlocked event.

Overall schedule: https://github.com/Igalia/webengineshackfest/wiki
Details and call-in instructions for the Tuesday smaller, more interactive session: https://github.com/Igalia/webengineshackfest/issues/97
Draft slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1gU05nfPxHha3cFbxnApiSQNvlcbKei_4Diw8A--NWjQ/edit?usp=drivesdk
